hints.description: This multinational corporation is a leading integrated energy company, involved in nearly every aspect of the oil and gas industry. They explore for, produce, refine, and distribute petroleum products, as well as manufacture petrochemicals. Darren Woods currently serves as the CEO, and the company is notable for its significant global operations and influence on energy markets.
hints.funFact1: Originally known as Standard Oil Company of New Jersey, the company was broken up in 1911 as part of the Supreme Court's antitrust ruling against John D. Rockefeller’s Standard Oil trust, leading to the creation of several independent companies.
hints.funFact2: The company’s research division developed synthetic rubber during World War II, a crucial contribution to the Allied war effort when natural rubber supplies were limited, and continues to invest heavily in research and development.
